title: Requirement
description: AI-first requirement: the WHAT derived from service-design artifacts (the WHY). JSON shape per the 2026-05 format reset (no user-story layer; provenance via traces_to; NFRs/constraints are separate doc types referenced by id, per the IEEE 830 load-bearing-separation finding). Part of the definition layer (legion #526).

traces_to.description: Provenance on the requirement itself: moment_of_truth.<id>, journey phase, or pain theme

depends_on.description: Requirement ids this depends on; cycle detection enforces consistency

nfr_refs.description: Ids of *.nfr.json documents constraining this requirement

constraint_refs.description: Ids of *.constraint.json documents binding this requirement

ui.description: UI behavior; references veneer renderings where applicable

verification.description: How this requirement is verified: acceptance items, test references
